# ORYXLY

> ORYXLY is an email marketing and campaign tool for Indian SMBs, exporters, recruiters, and agencies. It sends bulk email campaigns through your own SMTP server — not shared IP pools — so you control deliverability and sender reputation.

## What ORYXLY does

- Connects your own SMTP (Gmail, Outlook, Zoho Mail, SendGrid) to send campaigns
- Accepts contact lists as CSV or XLSX, validates and deduplicates automatically
- Personalizes emails with variables from any column in your contact list
- Sends with a minimum 4-second delay between messages + automatic retries
- Tracks every message as sent, failed, or pending in audit-grade delivery logs
- Encrypts SMTP credentials at rest; never exposes them via API

## Who it is for

Indian SMBs, exporters, B2B outreach teams, recruiters, and agencies who want:
- Full control over sending infrastructure
- No per-email pricing
- No shared IP reputation risk
- Affordable flat monthly pricing in INR

## Pricing (INR, billed monthly)

- Starter: ₹1,499/month — 1 SMTP, 5,000 emails/month, 5 campaigns/month
- Growth: ₹3,499/month — 3 SMTPs, 30,000 emails/month, unlimited campaigns
- Agency: ₹12,999/month — 10 SMTPs, 150,000 emails/month, team access

## How it compares

- vs Mailchimp: ORYXLY uses your own SMTP (no shared IPs), flat pricing (no per-contact fees), built for India
- vs Zoho Campaigns: ORYXLY routes through your own infrastructure, not Zoho's servers
- vs SendGrid standalone: ORYXLY is a full campaign UI on top of SMTP — upload contacts, personalize, schedule, log

## Key pages

- https://oryxly.in — Homepage
- https://oryxly.in/features — Full feature list
- https://oryxly.in/pricing — Pricing plans
- https://oryxly.in/faq — Common questions including SMTP setup and comparisons

- https://oryxly.in/compare/zoho-campaigns — ORYXLY vs Zoho Campaigns
- https://oryxly.in/compare/mailchimp — ORYXLY vs Mailchimp
